LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS WILLIAM GRAY AND JESSICA GRAY'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITIONS THAT: 1) THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED BY JULY 25, 2017 AND 2) PLAINTIFFS SERVE VERIFIED CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES NO LATER THAN JULY 28, 2017 TO THE FOLLOWING DEEM SERVED DISCOVERY: A) STATE ALL FACTS IN SUPPORT OF ALL NEW CAUSES OF ACTION AND ALLEGATIONS, B) IDENTIFY AND PROVIDE FULL CONTACT INFORMATION FOR ALL PERSONS WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY OF THOSE FACTS AND STATE WHAT FACTS EACH PERSON KNOWS, AND C) IDENTIFY AND, TO THE EXTENT NOT ALREADY PRODUCED IN THIS CASE, PRODUCE ALL DOCUMENTS THAT SET FORTH OR REFER TO ANY OF THOSE FACTS. GRANTING THIS MOTION IS IN ACCORD WITH THE LIBERAL POLICY FAVORING THE ALLOWANCE OF AMENDMENTS TO PLEADINGS AT ANY TIME DURING A CASE. THE CONDITIONS IMPOSED ON GRANTING THE MOTION ELIMINATE ANY POSSIBLE PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANTS BILL AND ANNE GRAY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Defendants appearing on their own behalf. No appearance by or on behalf of Plaintiff(s). Notice having been given and there being no objections by appearing defendants nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Continued To Dec-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-14-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS WILLIAM GRAY and JESSICA GRAY'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
is GRANTED on the conditions that: 1) the first amended complaint is filed by July 25, 2017 and 2) plaintiffs serve verified code-compliant responses no later than July 28, 2017 to the following deem served discovery: a) state all facts in support of all new causes of action and allegations, b) identify and provide full contact information for all persons with knowledge of any of those facts and state what facts each person knows, and c) identify and, to the extent not already produced in this case, produce all documents that set forth or refer to any of those facts. Granting this motion is in accord with the liberal policy favoring the allowance of amendments to pleadings at any time during a case. The conditions imposed on granting the motion eliminate any possible prejudice to defendants Bill and Anne Gray. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Set For Trial On Aug-14-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
